scripts.android:sync: bun run build:web && bash ./scripts/with-java17.sh cap sync android && bash ./scripts/patch-android-java.sh
scripts.android:apk:debug: bun run build:web && bash ./scripts/with-java17.sh cap sync android && bash ./scripts/patch-android-java.sh && cd android && bash ../scripts/with-java17.sh ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:apk:release: bash ./scripts/check-android-release-prereqs.sh && bun run build:web && bash ./scripts/with-java17.sh cap sync android && bash ./scripts/patch-android-java.sh && cd android && bash ../scripts/with-java17.sh ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:aab:release: bash ./scripts/check-android-release-prereqs.sh && bun run build:web && bash ./scripts/with-java17.sh cap sync android && bash ./scripts/patch-android-java.sh && cd android && bash ../scripts/with-java17.sh ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.ios:sync: bun run build:web && bash ./scripts/with-java17.sh cap sync ios
scripts.prettier: prettier --write capacitor.config.ts eslint.config.js package.json prettier.config.js tsconfig.json
